<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection; /** * @psalm-immutable */ interface Type { /** * Returns a rendered output of the Type as it would be used in a DocBlock. */ public function __toString(): string; }
